headline: Targa Resources Corp. Reports Record First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Increases Financial Outlook for 2026
summary: HOUSTON, May 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) (“TRGP,” the “Company” or “Targa”) today reported first quarter 2026 results. First quarter 2026 net income attributable to Targa Resources Corp. was $480 million compared to $271 million for the first quarter of 2025. The Company reported adjusted earnings before interest, income taxes, depreciation and amortization, and other non-cash items (“adjusted EBITDA”)(1) of $1,403 million for the first quarter of 2026 compare

content.title: Targa Resources Corp. Reports Record First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Increases Financial Outlook for 2026
content.summary: HOUSTON, May 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) (“TRGP,” the “Company” or “Targa”) today reported first quarter 2026 results. First quarter 2026 net income attributable to Targa Resources Corp. was $480 million compared to $271 million for the first quarter of 2025. The Company reported adjusted earnings before interest, income taxes, depreciation and amortization, and other non-cash items (“adjusted EBITDA”)(1) of $1,403 million for the first quarter of 2026 compare
